meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Master AI Development for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to streamline your freelance development workflow and ship high-quality projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop juggling fragmented AI tools. By centralizing your workflow through Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a powerhouse dev environment. This setup allows you to execute complex architectural refactors and rapid feature deployments with single-command precision, effectively eliminating cognitive load and accelerating your client delivery cycles.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape has devolved into a chaotic sprawl of browser tabs and disjointed AI assistants. You’re spending more time context-switching between LLMs than actually shipping production-grade code. It’s a silent killer of billable hours and professional reputation, leaving you buried under an avalanche of 'intelligent' but uncoordinated tools.

Relief arrives by consolidating your stack. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you bridge the gap between intent and execution. This isn't just about automation; it’s about establishing an authoritative, command-line-first workflow that treats your codebase as a single source of truth, turning your terminal into a high-octane engineering partner.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure, authenticated bridge between your terminal and the Anthropic API to ensure low-latency code execution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional dev environment configuration that integrates Claude Code with local file system permissions and git hooks.

steps.title: Contextual Knowledge Mapping
steps.description: Feed your project architecture into the Claude context window so the AI understands your specific folder structure and business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory and generate a comprehensive context map for Claude Code to follow during refactoring tasks.

steps.title: Automated Architectural Refactoring
steps.description: Execute high-level logic changes across multiple files without the risk of manual copy-paste errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication flow to support multi-tenant JWT validation across the entire codebase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Refactor auth flow for multi-tenant support'

steps.title: Unit Test Coverage Injection
steps.description: Force the AI to write robust test suites before finalizing feature implementation to ensure high-quality output.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the new modules created in the previous step, ensuring 90% coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Write Jest tests for newly created auth modules'

steps.title: Deployment Readiness Audit
steps.description: Run a final scan to catch security vulnerabilities and linting errors before pushing to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit and dependency vulnerability scan on the current build before deployment.

pro_tips: Alias your most frequent Claude commands in your .zshrc file to reduce keystrokes by 70%.
Use a dedicated '.claudeignore' file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts.
Always run 'claude status' before a major refactor to verify the AI's current understanding of the codebase state.
Leverage Antigravity to inject custom system prompts that enforce your specific coding standards (e.g., 'Always use TypeScript interfaces').
Pipe Claude output directly into your linter to instantly fix formatting issues caused by AI suggestions.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, focus on building a 'Master Prompt Library'—a collection of specific, high-intent prompts you can reuse across multiple client projects to ensure consistent quality.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to outpace the competition. Stop fighting your tools and start engineering your success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
